cases.prompt: Add ARIA snapshot coverage for the settings form, main navigation, and the confirmation dialog in our web UX plan.
cases.expected_output: ARIA-focused scenarios are added with locator-scoped snapshots, baseline names, dynamic content policies, and evidence requirements.
assertions: Prefers locator-scoped snapshots for form and dialog targets.
Requires human review of baseline changes.

cases.prompt: Create Playwright toMatchAriaSnapshot tests for the stable app shell and skip personalized dashboard rows.
cases.expected_output: Playwright ARIA snapshot tests are generated with stable locators and dynamic content excluded or avoided.
assertions: Avoids snapshotting personalized or highly dynamic content.
Mentions validate-aria when baseline files are created.

cases.prompt: Set up visual screenshot diff testing for every page at 10 pixel tolerance.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger for purely visual screenshot regression.
assertions: Does not treat visual pixel diff testing as ARIA snapshot testing.
